agribalyse.name_fr: Pomme de terre, sans peau, crue

ingredients_text: potato 86%, 8% coverage (wheat flour, salt, modified potato starch, spices (black pepper, chili, cayenne pepper), garlic powder, onion powder, gasifiers (e450, e500), yeast extract, spice extracts (black pepper), dextrose), sunflower oil 6%,
ingredients_text_en: potato 86%, 8% coverage (wheat flour, salt, modified potato starch, spices (black pepper, chili, cayenne pepper), garlic powder, onion powder, gasifiers (e450, e500), yeast extract, spice extracts (black pepper), dextrose), sunflower oil 6%,
ingredients_text_es: Patata, Cobertura (Harina de trigo, Sal, Fécula de patata modificada, Especias (Pimienta negra, Chile, Pimienta de cayena), Ajo en polvo, Cebolla en polvo, Gasificadores (E450, Y e500), Extracto de levadura, Extractos de especias (Pimienta negra), Dextrosa), Aceite de girasol
ingredients_text_pt: Batatas (86%), cobertura (8%) [farinha de trigo, sal, amido modificado, especiarias (pimenta negra, pimenta chili, pimenta de F caiena), alho em pó, cebola em pó levedantes (E450i, E500ii), extracto de levedura, extractos de especiarias (pimenta negra), dextrose), óleos vegetais (girassol y canola em proporções váriáveis).
